center.name: 松巴島
center.summary: 松巴島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Red-naped fruit dove、Sumba hornbill、Sumba eclectus等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The species is endemic to the island of Sumba in Indonesia, where it mostly inhabits montane forests at elevations above 500 m

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Sumba eclectus, or Cornelia's eclectus (Eclectus cornelia) is a parrot species which is native to Sumba

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Mai 1897 in Dresden|journal=Journal für Ornithologie|date=1897|volume=45|issue=4|page=513|doi=10.1007/BF02207249|s2cid=8223540|url=https://www.biodiversitylibrary.org/part/142546 }} The title page of the volume has 1897 but the article was not published until 1898. | synonyms = Aceros everetti }} Sumba hornbill (), or known natively as Julang (in Sumba languages) is a large bird belonging to the family of , endemic and native to the Indonesian island of Sumba

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is endemic to Sumba in the western Lesser Sunda Islands of Indonesia, where it is found in forest with a significant component of deciduous trees
